title: Upon Bridget. Epig.
content:
Of four teeth only Bridget was possest;
    Two she spat out, a cough forced out the rest.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Bridget. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
